content.text:
<timestamp>Wednesday, May 20, 2026, 4:04 PM (UTC+8)</timestamp>
<user_query>
Day 1 setup. Please run these steps in order: 1) Create a Next.js 14 project in the current folder: npx create-next-app@latest . --typescript --tailwind --app --src-dir --import-alias "@/*" --use-npm (ESLint yes, Turbopack no). 2) Install packages: npm install @supabase/supabase-js @supabase/ssr next-auth openai date-fns googleapis and npm install -D @types/node. 3) Set up shadcn/ui: npx shadcn@latest init (Default style, Slate, CSS variables yes). 4) Add components: npx shadcn@latest add card button badge tabs textarea input dialog scroll-area separator. 5) Run npm run dev and confirm http://localhost:3000 loads. Report back after each step.
</user_query>

Understood — I’ll execute the setup exactly in the order you listed and report after each step. I’ll first verify the current workspace directory, then run `create-next-app` with your specified options.
